tasks.label: Activate venv
tasks.command: powershell -NoExit -Command "cd backend; if (Test-Path .venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1) { . .venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1 } elseif (Test-Path ..\.venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1) { . ..\.venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1 } else { Write-Host 'No .venv found in backend or project root' }"
